calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-11-2021 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-23-2021 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-13-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brianna Mannion for San Francisco Public Administrator.

The Court noted that there is a question as to whether this is the proper venue. Ms. Mannion stated that she included in the petition an attachment that addresses venue, that she felt responding to the Probate Examiner's note would have been repetitive, that she also filed a supplement that addresses the other issues and that she provided a birth record regarding Ann Roberts. The Court noted that Mr. Woodruff was ordered by this Court into an LPS conservatorship and that the Conservator placed him in the other County. Ms. Mannion indicated that it is her understanding that if Mr. Woodruff was freed from the LPS conservatorship he would have returned to San Francisco. The Court finds that venue is appropriate in San Francisco. Ms. Mannion stated that the dates of death of the Parents were provided in a supplemental declaration that was filed on November 8th (copy provided). The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (order signed in open Court). Status on close of estate is set for May 11, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Chan. Not reported.
